---
title: "Social Media Pages"
format: html
editor: visual
---

````{=html}

```{=html}
<a class="twitter-timeline" data-height="600" href="[https://twitter.com/EconomistAadil?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw](https://twitter.com/EconomistAadil?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw)">Tweets by EconomistAadil</a> 
<script async src="[https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js](https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js)" charset="utf-8"></script>
```

````
